dialogos.texto_en: *sigh*
(I'm in trouble. Just the thought of Ichika\n being in the bed next to me\n makes me nervous and unable to sleep...)
(When we stayed in the same room\n during the school camping trip,\n it wasn't like this.)
(Well, things have changed a lot since then,\n so it's only natural, I guess.)
(...Speaking of which, Raiha said that \n Itsuki was feeling lonely, and moved to Yotsuba's room\n before going to bed.)
(So that means there's one room available.\n Can I move there, maybe?\n I might be able to get the key from the front desk.)
Nnh...\nFutaro-kun?
Ah...
Where are you going?\nAre you sneaking out to play at night?
N-nothing like that.\n...Sorry, did I wake you up?
No, it's okay. I was already awake.\nI'm supposed to be tired,\nbut I can't seem to sleep well.
Same as me.
Ahaha, we're in the same boat.
If this were our house, I'd make you some\nhot milk with honey to help you sleep.\nIt's a classic remedy for insomnia.
But, there's no point in asking for something\nthat isn't available%p-2;――
Let's talk until we get sleepy.\nLet's be quiet so as not to wake Raiha-chan.
...Yeah, okay.\nActually, there's something I wanted to ask you.
Hm? What?
Why did we end up with this room arrangement?
Ahaha...\nYou don't like it?
N-no, it's not like that.
But, realistically, this room arrangement is a flop\nsince neither of us can sleep.
Hmm?\nIs it because you're nervous being with me\nin the same room, Futaro-kun?
...Well, yes. Sorry.
No, it's okay.\nBecause I'm the same way.
You know, if you're gonna ask me why I made\nthese arrangements, it's because I wanted\nto spend more time with you, Futaro-kun.
Ever since we started dating,\nwe've both been pretty busy, right?\nWe haven't been able to go on many real dates.
So I asked everyone to let us be together\nas much as possible during this trip.
(...That's what she was thinking of?\n I'm going to Tokyo after this trip,\n so this time is even more precious.)
Ichika.\nLet's make a lot of memories on this trip, okay?
...Okay.
Achoo!
!!\nYou okay?
Nnn... Hmmmm...?
You're both still awake.
Sorry, Raiha-chan.\nWe woke you up.
...Ah. \nI'm interrupting something, huh.\nI'll pretend to sleep then.
It's too late for that.\nCome on, Ichika, let's go to sleep too.
Ahaha, yeah, let's.\nGoodnight, Futaro-kun, Raiha-chan.
Okay, good night.
Good niiight.
